buy.confirmDescription: Your purchase has been initiated. Transfer the amount with the provided reference code.
buy.howMuch: How much do you want to buy?

hardware.connectDescription: Connect your BitBox02 via USB or scan for BitBox02 Nova via Bluetooth.
hardware.connectDescriptionIos: Scan for your BitBox02 Nova via Bluetooth.

kyc.completeDescription: Your identity verification is being reviewed.
kyc.title: KYC Verification

legal.accept: I have read and agree to the Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and Disclaimer.
legal.title: Legal Information

onboarding.createError: Could not create wallet. Please try again.
onboarding.invalidSeed: Invalid seed phrase. Must be 12 or 24 words.
onboarding.restoreError: Could not restore wallet. Please try again.
onboarding.subtitle: Buy and sell crypto directly with your wallet
onboarding.title: Welcome to DFX

passkey.backupWarning: You can export your recovery phrase later in Settings. This is recommended as a backup in case you lose access to your passkey.
passkey.createDescription: Your wallet will be secured by a passkey stored in your device's secure element. No seed phrase to write down.
passkey.createError: Failed to create passkey. Please try again.
passkey.prfUnsupported: Your passkey provider does not support the required encryption feature (PRF). Third-party providers like Bitwarden do not support this yet. Please use {{provider}} as your passkey provider instead.
passkey.restoreDescription: Use your existing passkey to restore your wallet. The same passkey will derive the same wallet.
passkey.restoreError: Failed to restore wallet from passkey. Please try again.
passkey.restoreInfo: Make sure you are using the same passkey that was used to create the wallet. If your passkey was synced via iCloud or Google, it should be available on this device.
passkey.step1: A passkey is created and stored securely on your device.
passkey.step2: Your wallet keys are derived from the passkey.
passkey.step3: No seed phrase to write down — your passkey is your key.

pay.cameraPermission: Camera access is needed to scan QR codes.
pay.comingSoonMessage: Payments are not yet available. Scanned: {{data}}

pin.createDescription: Choose a 6-digit PIN to secure your wallet.
pin.saveError: Could not save PIN. Please try again.
pin.tooMany: Too many failed attempts. Please restart the app.

portfolio.emptyDescription: Buy your first crypto to get started.

receive.onlyCorrectNetwork: Only send {{asset}} on the {{network}} network to this address.
receive.title: Receive

seedExport.deriveFailed: Failed to derive recovery phrase from passkey. Please try again.
seedExport.descriptionPasskey: Authenticate with your passkey to reveal your recovery phrase. Write it down and store it in a safe place as a backup.
seedExport.descriptionSeed: Your recovery phrase is the only way to recover your wallet. Keep it safe and never share it.
seedExport.warning: Never share your recovery phrase. Anyone with these words can access your wallet.

sell.howMuch: How much do you want to sell?
sell.title: Sell

send.irreversible: Transactions are irreversible. Please verify the recipient address and amount.
send.title: Send

settings.deleteWalletConfirm: This will permanently remove your wallet from this device. Make sure you have backed up your seed phrase.
settings.deleteWalletConfirmPasskey: This will permanently remove your wallet from this device. If you need to restore it, you will need your passkey or your exported recovery phrase. Please also delete the passkey from your device settings.
settings.title: Settings
